name: Raak Boon
overview: It explores the idea of a powerful ancient box that could make your deepest desires come true. Much like a genie indebted to you, this “glong raak boon”- this box of holy source- asks you to repay with three deeds, and upon successful completion, it will grant your greatest wish.

trailers.title: [Teaser 1-2] รากบุญ 2 ตอน รอยรักแรงมาร (Rak Boon 2) เริ่ม 8 ก.ค. นี้!
